DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH PREVIOUS ORDERS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION 1, 13, AND 14 AND FORM INTERROGATORY 8.6 WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS ORDER OF THE COURT WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $846.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. BRUCE E. CHAN.
